# Tiger Studio Manager

> Desktop companion for the TigerTag RFID filament-tracking ecosystem. Electron app тАФ Vanilla JS + Firebase + NFC.

Tiger Studio Manager is an Electron (v41) desktop application for managing 3D-printing filament spools tagged with TigerTag RFID chips. It provides real-time Firestore inventory sync, live 3D printer integration for 5 brands, NFC chip read/write, hardware sensors (color sensor, scale), rack storage management, and a friends system тАФ all in a single window without a build step (no bundler).

Current version: **1.8.2** тАФ macOS (Intel + Apple Silicon, signed & notarized), Windows, Linux.

## Architecture

- **Entry point**: `main.js` (Electron main process)
- **Renderer**: `renderer/inventory.html` + `renderer/inventory.js` (single IIFE, ~12 000 lines) + modular CSS in `renderer/css/`
- **Preload bridge**: `preload.js` тАФ exposes IPC handlers to renderer via `window.electronAPI`
- **NFC**: `services/nfc-process.js` runs as a `utilityProcess` (not a Worker Thread) to avoid SIGABRT on macOS; communicates via IPC
- **Printer integrations**: `renderer/printers/<brand>/index.js` тАФ one file per brand, loaded dynamically
- **IoT sensors**: `renderer/IoT/td1s/` (TD1S color sensor), `renderer/IoT/tigerscale/` (TigerScale ESP32)
- **CSS**: `renderer/css/00-base.css` тЖТ `70-detail-misc.css` (8 files, loaded in numeric order via `<link>` tags)
- **i18n**: `renderer/locales/` тАФ 9 JSON files (en/fr/de/es/it/zh/pt/pt-pt/pl), managed via `npm run i18n:add`
- **TigerTag SDK**: `@tigertag/sdk` npm package тАФ parse, verify, encode TigerTag NTAG chips (pages 4тАУ39, 144 bytes, blockSize=4)

## Key source files

- `renderer/CODEMAP.md` тАФ maps every feature in `inventory.js` to a line range and anchor function name. **Read this before grepping inventory.js.**
- `renderer/inventory.js` тАФ all application logic: state management, Firestore subscriptions, UI rendering, NFC handling, printer comms, friends system, telemetry
- `main.js` тАФ IPC handlers: `app:info`, `rfid:encode-cloud`, `rfid:write-chip`, `rfid:read-chip`, `rfid:reader-update`, window management, auto-update
- `preload.js` тАФ contextBridge: exposes `electronAPI` (IPC wrappers), `td1s` (TD1S sensor events)
- `services/nfc-process.js` тАФ NFC utilityProcess: reader lifecycle, NTAG read (READ_START_PAGE=4, READ_LENGTH=144, READ_BLOCK_SIZE=4), card-present events

## State object (renderer)

```
state = {
  inventory,        // raw Firestore docs { [spoolId]: data }
  rows,             // normalizeRow() output array
  selected,         // open detail panel spoolId
  nfcReaders,       // Set<readerName> тАФ connected readers
  nfcCardPresent,   // Map<readerName, {uid}> тАФ readers with a card on them
  friends, friendRequests,
  publicKey,        // XXX-XXX discovery code
  privateKey,       // 40-char hex access token
  isPublic, isAdmin, debugEnabled,
  lang, i18n, viewMode, sortCol, sortDir,
  activeAccountId, displayName, db
}
```

## Firestore data model

```
publicKeys/{key}           тЖТ { uid, claimedAt }
userProfiles/{uid}         тЖТ { publicKey, displayName, isPublic, color_* }
users/{uid}                тЖТ { displayName, email, publicKey, privateKey, isPublic, roles, Debug,
                               studioVersion, studioElectron, studioPlatform, studioArch,
                               studioOsRelease, studioOsVersion, studioLang, studioLocale,
                               studioLastSeen }
  /inventory/{spoolId}     тЖТ { uid, id_brand, id_material, color_name, online_color_list,
                               weight_available, container_weight, container_id, capacity,
                               updatedAt, deleted, twin_uid }
  /telemetry/studio        тЖТ { sessionsCount, versionsUsed[], platformsUsed[], lastSeen,
                               td1sUsed, rfidReadersMax }
  /friends/{friendUid}     тЖТ { displayName, addedAt, key }
  /friendRequests/{uid}    тЖТ { displayName, requestedAt, key }
  /blacklist/{uid}         тЖТ { displayName, blockedAt }
  /racks/{rackId}          тЖТ rack layout docs
  /printers/{brand}/...    тЖТ printer connection docs
  /prefs/app               тЖТ { lang }
  /scales/{mac}            тЖТ TigerScale heartbeat
  /apiKeys/{docId}         тЖТ API key docs
  /telemetry/{docId}       тЖТ aggregated usage metrics
  /uidMigrationMap/{id}    тЖТ decimal тЖТ hex UID migration
```

Cloud spools have `spoolId` starting with `CLOUD_`. `normalizeRow()` sets `r.isCloud = true` for these. On encoding, the Cloud doc is promoted: `spoolId` replaced by the chip UID, Cloud doc hard-deleted.

## NFC / RFID system

- **ACR122U** via `nfc-pcsc` in a `utilityProcess` тАФ avoids SIGABRT on macOS
- **NTAG read**: `reader.read(4, 144, 4)` тАФ start page 4, 144 bytes (36 pages), blockSize=4 (critical: prevents sliding-window overlap)
- **Chip encode**: `TigerTag.fromCloudDoc(doc).patch({ timestamp }).toBytes(false)` тЖТ 80 bytes тЖТ write pages 4тАУ0x17
- **Multi-reader**: up to 2 simultaneous readers; `state.nfcCardPresent` Map tracks which reader has a card
- **TigerPOD**: free 3D-printable stand (MakerWorld #1289152) with 2 reader slots for dual encoding

RFID badge in header: always visible. Disconnected = filled red gradient pill, clicking opens TigerPOD modal. Connected = green tint. Card-present = filled green gradient.

TigerPOD modal opens from four triggers: (1) cloud spool banner click with no reader, (2) "Please update RFID" banner click with no reader, (3) red RFID badge click, (4) `+ Scan` button click with no reader.

## Printer integrations

Each brand has `renderer/printers/<brand>/PROTOCOL.md` (self-contained spec) and `index.js` (implementation).

| Brand | Protocol | Port |
|---|---|---|
| Bambu Lab | MQTTS TLS | 8883 |
| Creality | WebSocket | 9999 |
| Elegoo | MQTT | 1883 |
| FlashForge | HTTP poll + TCP M-codes | 8898 / 8899 |
| Snapmaker | Moonraker WebSocket | 7125 |

All brands: printer discovery (mDNS + port scan + manual IP), filament edit per slot, camera widget.

## Sensors

- **TD1S** (`renderer/IoT/td1s/`) тАФ USB color + TD sensor. `window.td1s.onStatus(cb)` supports multiple listeners (IPC `on`, not `once`). Scan color (1тАУ3 slots) and TD value independently or together.
- **TigerScale** (`renderer/IoT/tigerscale/`) тАФ ESP32 scale over WebSocket. Live weight, container/filament split, TARE (hold-to-confirm), twin UID grid.

## i18n system

`t(key, params?)` тАФ looks up `state.i18n[state.lang][key]`, fallback chain: requested lang тЖТ en тЖТ key itself. Supports `{{param}}` interpolation, `["array"]` random pick, `{"one":"тАж","other":"тАж"}` plurals.

**Never edit locale JSON files by hand.** Use:
```bash
npm run i18n:add -- myKey --after existingKey en="..." fr="..." de="..." es="..." it="..." zh="..." pt="..." pt-pt="..." pl="..."
npm run i18n:check   # validates consistency (also runs as pre-commit hook)
```
791 keys ├Ч 9 locales as of v1.8.2.

## CSS conventions

- One dimension + `aspect-ratio` for SVG mask icons (never both `width` and `height`)
- Asset URLs: `url('../../assets/svg/icons/тАж')` from `renderer/css/` (two `..` to project root)
- Specificity: double class selector instead of `!important` when fighting global rules
- Hold-to-confirm buttons: `setupHoldToConfirm(el, durationMs, cb)` with `<span class="hold-progress"></span>` child

## Key JS patterns

- **Modals**: `.modal-overlay` + `.modal-card`, toggled via `.open` class
- **Resizable panels**: `makePanelResizable(panelEl, handleEl, storageKey)` тАФ drag handle, localStorage persistence
- **Weight slider auto-save**: 500 ms debounce тЖТ Firestore write; `.wb-saving` pulse class during window
- **Health indicator**: `#health` cloud icon; `fromCache === false` тЖТ green, `true` тЖТ red; lazy RTT ping on `mouseenter`
- **Telemetry**: two-level тАФ `users/{uid}` (last-known, overwrite) + `users/{uid}/telemetry/studio` (lifetime, FieldValue.increment/arrayUnion). Guards `_telTd1s` / `_telRfidMax` prevent duplicate writes per session.

## Auth & security

- Firebase Auth (Google OAuth loopback PKCE + email/password)
- `displayName` always from Firestore `users/{uid}.displayName` (pseudo), never from Firebase Auth `user.displayName` (Google real name)
- `roles` and `Debug` fields writable only via Firebase Admin SDK / Cloud Function тАФ never by client
- Firestore Security Rules enforce owner-only access; friends granted inventory read via presence in `friends/` subcollection

## LocalStorage keys

`tigertag.accounts` ┬╖ `tigertag.activeAccount` ┬╖ `tigertag.inv.<id>` ┬╖ `tigertag.view` ┬╖ `tigertag.lang` ┬╖ `tigertag.sidebar` ┬╖ `tigertag.panelWidth.detail` ┬╖ `tigertag.panelWidth.debug`

## Build & release

```bash
npm start                          # dev (no bundler)
npm run i18n:check                 # validate all 9 locales
git tag v1.8.2 && git push --tags  # triggers CI: parallel build macOS/Windows/Linux тЖТ GitHub Release
```

CI: `.github/workflows/build.yml` тАФ Apple Developer ID signing + notarytool on macOS, electron-builder on all platforms, publishes to GitHub Releases.

## Optional docs

- `renderer/CODEMAP.md` тАФ line ranges for every feature in `inventory.js`
- `ROADMAP.md` тАФ what's done / in progress / backlog, grouped by domain
- `DEVLOG.md` тАФ per-session engineering journal
- `renderer/printers/<brand>/PROTOCOL.md` тАФ self-contained agent skill per printer brand
- `TIGERTAG_FIREBASE_INTEGRATION.md` тАФ third-party Firebase integration guide
